text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
See? What did we say? There's no way you could
ever win, Nari. You're just too puny!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up, shut up, shut up! I—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like hell I'm going back to sleep after that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems a little sleep-deprived after
a restless night...
